title: Parkio Daily for May 17, 2026
teaser: Mandalorian attraction update launches at both coasts, Statler and Waldorf heckle on Rock 'n' Roller Coaster, and price hikes confirmed ahead.

rides.name: Space Mountain
rides.note: Early morning waits typically under 20 minutes

rides.name: Soarin'
rides.note: Dinner hour often brings walk-on windows

bignews.title: Mandalorian Mission Lands on Millennium Falcon May 22
bignews.body: A new storyline featuring Din Djarin and Grogu launches on Smugglers Run at both Walt Disney World and Disneyland on May 22. Guests team up with Mando to chase ex-Imperial officers across planets including Tatooine, Bespin, Endor, and Coruscant, with new engineer controls that let you check on Grogu and pick the destination.

parkioInsight.text: Opening week tends to draw heavy crowds to Galaxy's Edge. Riding Smugglers Run within the first hour of park opening or during dinner usually keeps waits manageable, often under 40 minutes.

bignews.title: Disney Confirms Continued Price Increases Through Expansion Period
bignews.body: Disney executives told investors to expect both pricing and attendance growth as major expansions roll out across Walt Disney World. Officials cited Villains Land, Piston Peak, Monstropolis, and Tropical Americas as drivers of future price hikes alongside new guest demand.

parkioInsight.text: Booking trips before major land openings often locks in lower ticket prices. If you're planning 2027 or 2028 visits, purchasing tickets now may save money before the next round of increases.

bignews.title: Statler and Waldorf Now Heckle Guests on Rock 'n' Roller Coaster
bignews.body: The beloved MuppetVision 3-D Audio-Animatronics of Statler and Waldorf have been installed on the newly rethemed Rock 'n' Roller Coaster Starring the Muppets at Hollywood Studios. The pair deliver on-ride commentary during the launch sequence and throughout the attraction.

parkioInsight.text: First-time riders will want to listen for new dialogue throughout the coaster experience. Rope-drop or late-evening rides usually offer the shortest waits to catch the fresh content.

topstories.title: Mandalorian Food and Merch Hit Galaxy's Edge
topstories.body: Grogu Cookies, Sweet-and-Spicy Puffer Pig Pasta, and The Mandalorian jetpack sippers debut across Galaxy's Edge locations at both resorts. New merchandise includes The Mandalorian and Grogu tees, puzzles, and figure sets at locations like Tatooine Traders and Dok-Ondar's Den.

parkioInsight.text: Limited-edition sippers and merch often sell out within days of release. Arriving at Galaxy's Edge merchandise locations within the first two hours of park opening tends to ensure availability.

topstories.title: The Curious Child Projection Show Starts May 16 at Disneyland
topstories.body: Grogu takes center stage in a new short projection experience called The Curious Child, running after Shadows of Memory near the Millennium Falcon in Disneyland's Galaxy's Edge for a limited time. The show uses the spires of Batuu to showcase Grogu's memories with the Mandalorian.

parkioInsight.text: Evening projection shows typically draw large standing crowds. Claiming a spot near the Millennium Falcon 20 to 30 minutes before showtime usually provides clear sightlines without heavy jostling.

topstories.title: Toy Story 5 and Stitch Mystery Boxes Now at Disney Springs
topstories.body: New mystery boxes themed to Toy Story 5, Stitch, and sweet treats are now available at Marketplace Co-Op in Disney Springs. Each box contains a curated selection of themed merchandise items sold at a bundled price point.

parkioInsight.text: Mystery boxes at Marketplace Co-Op often sell out by mid-afternoon on weekends. Shopping before noon typically ensures better selection and full inventory.

icymi.title: New Docking Bay 7 Menus Coming for Mandalorian Film
icymi.body: Docking Bay 7 in Galaxy's Edge at both resorts will debut new Baby Yoda and Mandalorian-themed food items to coincide with the theatrical release on May 22. The counter-service location has not updated its menu significantly since opening.

icymi.title: Best and Worst Days to Visit Each Disney World Park
icymi.body: An updated strategy guide for 2026 identifies Monday and Friday as typically the lightest crowd days at Magic Kingdom, while Saturday and Sunday see the heaviest traffic. EPCOT, Hollywood Studios, and Animal Kingdom each have distinct weekday patterns influenced by special events and Extended Evening Hours.

spotlight.title: Plan Around Galaxy's Edge This Week
spotlight.body: With the Mandalorian mission launching May 22 and new food, merchandise, and projections already live, Galaxy's Edge is seeing elevated interest at both coasts. Crowds tend to spike during the first week of major Star Wars releases, and this film ties directly into park experiences.

parkioInsight.text: Galaxy's Edge usually sees the heaviest crowds from late morning through mid-afternoon during major releases. Visiting during early entry or the final two hours before park close often provides shorter waits and better dining availability.
